items.claim: Aleandro Costa has two consecutive finishes by body shots.
items.quote: Coster, I believe, has two finishes in a row by body shots.

items.claim: Cody Duran is weak to body shots.
items.quote: And Cody Duran is weak to the body.

items.claim: Ryan Gandra is a devastating first-round knockout artist.
items.quote: Ryan Gandra is completely unproven. Lost a couple of fights ago, but he's a really devastating firstround KO artist.
he has the coordination of an Indian guy.

items.claim: Zachary Reese has a chin that is susceptible to being hit.
items.quote: Zachary Reese is hitable. His chin's there to be smacked.

items.claim: Farid Basharat consistently scrapes by against mid-level opponents outside the rankings.
items.quote: he just scrapes by barely against them.

items.claim: John Garza is fighting on six days' notice.
items.quote: John Gaza just stepped in on short notice. 6 days notice to fight Farad Basherat.

items.claim: Damian Pinas is physically large for his division.
items.quote: Penis is just big for the division that he's in.

items.claim: Caesar Almeida is susceptible to being finished by strikes.
items.quote: Almeida is chinable though. He is chinnable.

items.claim: Wang Kong has shown significant improvements in her grappling defense.
items.quote: she's shown real improvements in her grappling defense.

items.claim: Wang Kong's striking is superior to Tracy Cortez's.
items.quote: her striking is just way better than Tracy Cortez's.
